title: Kelsey Cummings
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Kelsey Cummings
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
biography: Kelsey Cummings is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Communication Studies at Christopher Newport University. Her research on new media and identity has been published in the journals Television & New Media , Feminist Media Studies , Social Media + Society , Studies in the Fantastic , Global Storytelling: Journal of Digital and Moving Images , Transformative Works and Cultures, and Lateral: Journal of the Cultural Studies Association.
education_entries: Ph D in Film and Media Studies, University of Pittsburgh
MS in Media Studies, University of Oregon
BA in Film Studies/English Language and Literature, Smith College
teaching_interests: Intro to Critical Media Studies Video Game Studies Critical Social Media Senior Research in Communication Communication and Film
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2025). ‘Help Them Keep Doing What They’re Doing’: Intersections of Agency, Affect, and Capital in the Twitch Subscription System . Lateral: Journal of the Cultural Studies Association. Volume, 14. Issue, 2.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2025). Real Enough: Power and Politics in Real Person Fiction . Transformative Works and Cultures. Volume, 46.
